governance.boardSummary: The strategic leadership overseeing FRPD's global operations and ethical standards.
governance.teamSummary: The multidisciplinary experts driving our daily research and innovation efforts.
governance.adminSummary: The dedicated support team ensuring seamless day-to-day operations and institutional excellence.

board.name: Dr. Shakeel Shahzad
board.bio: Over 15 years of distinguished experience in national and international economic policy and institutional reform. Former Advisor to GIZ International Services (GIZ IS/GmbH) and the Central Asia Development Group (CADG).

board.name: Dr. Miraj Ul Haq
board.bio: Over 18 years of distinguished experience in national economic policy and institutional reform in education. Currently, working as Associate Professor at International Islamic University – IIUI, Islamabad.

team.name: Michael Okafor
team.bio: Specializes in microeconomic modeling and supply chain dynamics in emerging markets.

adminStaff.name: Sarah Collins
adminStaff.bio: Expert in institutional logistics and process optimization. Manages the core administrative functions across global offices.

ui.heroDesc: FRPD is governed by a distinguished board and supported by a global network of researchers, policy experts, and administrative professionals.

governance.boardSummary: القيادة الاستراتيجية التي تشرف على عمليات FRPD العالمية والمعايير الأخلاقية.
governance.teamSummary: الخبراء متعددو التخصصات الذين يقودون جهودنا اليومية في البحث والابتكار.
governance.adminSummary: فريق الدعم المتفاني الذي يضمن سلاسة العمليات اليومية والتميز المؤسسي.

board.name: د. شكيل شهزاد
board.bio: أكثر من 15 عاماً من الخبرة المتميزة في السياسة الاقتصادية الوطنية والدولية والإصلاح المؤسسي.

ui.heroDesc: تدار FRPD من قبل مجلس إدارة متميز وتدعمها شبكة عالمية من الباحثين وخبراء السياسات والمحترفين الإداريين.

governance.boardSummary: Die strategische Führung, die die globalen Aktivitäten und ethischen Standards der FRPD überwacht.

board.bio: Über 15 Jahre herausragende Erfahrung in nationaler und internationaler Wirtschaftspolitik und institutioneller Reform.

ui.heroDesc: Die FRPD wird von einem hochkarätigen Vorstand geleitet und von einem globalen Netzwerk aus Forschern, Politikexperten und Verwaltungsfachleuten unterstützt.

governance.boardSummary: 负责监督 FRPD 全球运营和伦理标准的战略领导层。

governance.teamSummary: 推动我们日常研究和创新工作的多学科专家。
governance.adminSummary: 确保日常运营顺畅和机构卓越的敬业支持团队。

board.name: Shakeel Shahzad 博士
board.bio: 在国家和国际经济政策以及机构改革方面拥有超过15年的卓越经验。

ui.heroDesc: FRPD 由杰出的董事会管理，并由研究人员、政策专家和行政专业人士组成的全球网络提供支持。
